items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Solutions Engineer to serve as the technical bridge between our sales team and prospective customers. You will partner with Account Executives to understand customer requirements, deliver compelling technical demonstrations, and design solutions that address complex business needs.

This role is ideal for someone who combines technical depth with strong communication skills and enjoys the thrill of winning deals through technical excellence.

Responsibilities

  • Conduct technical discovery sessions to understand customer architecture and requirements
  • Deliver engaging product demonstrations and proof-of-concept implementations
  • Respond to RFPs and security questionnaires with accurate, compelling answers
  • Design integration architectures and recommend implementation approaches
  • Collaborate with Product and Engineering to relay customer feedback and influence roadmap
  • Stay current on industry trends, competitive landscape, and emerging technologies

Requirements

  • 3+ years of solutions engineering, sales engineering, or technical consulting experience
  • Strong understanding of web technologies, APIs, and modern development practices
  • Experience with CMS, DXP, or content management technologies
  • Excellent presentation skills and ability to communicate with both technical and business audiences
  • Willingness to travel up to 25% for customer meetings and events

Nice to Have

  • Hands-on experience with Node.js, React, or headless CMS architectures
  • Experience with enterprise integration platforms (MuleSoft, Boomi, Workato)
  • Background in professional services or technical implementation
